An aerial city of pale white colour causes the fall of thunder-
bolts and storms; if it arises in a blasted quarter, a king will die;
if it is to the left (of an army or town), it will cause trouble from
enemies; and if to the right, it will confer victory.
[The word 1S a technical term. This is the appellation
given to a paaiticular quarter among the eight. For details see
LXXXVI-12 infra.]

When an aerial city of various colours and shapes shines in
the sky with streamers, banners and gateways, the earth will drink
plenty of the blood of elephants, horses and human beings in
battle.
